title: Advisor scout-run — warm up 'documentation' (never run)
perceive: Keep advisor 'documentation' warm and current — advisors are Ozi's special attention on a specialty. Reason due: never run. Advisor home: WAI-Spoke/advisors/documentation/. Run its specialty scan and record the run so last_run_at reflects today.
execute: 1. Read WAI-Spoke/advisors/documentation/context_prompt.md and feeds.yaml to load documentation's charter, scan scope, and inputs.
2. Perform documentation's specialty scan as described in its context_prompt; produce concrete, impact-ranked findings.
3. Append findings to WAI-Spoke/advisors/documentation/findings-log.jsonl (one JSON object per finding).
4. For any actionable finding, write a haiku task lug to WAI-Spoke/lugs/bytype/implementation/open/ (model_fit=haiku, initiative=crew-maintenance).
5. Set last_run_at=2026-06-14T11:40:04.149892Z in WAI-Spoke/advisors/schedule-index.json (entry advisor_id=documentation) AND WAI-Spoke/advisors/documentation/scan_state.json.
verify: schedule-index.json and WAI-Spoke/advisors/documentation/scan_state.json both show last_run_at=today for 'documentation'; any findings were appended to findings-log.jsonl.
completion_notes: Scan executed successfully. Performed documentation advisor's specialty scan according to context_prompt charter: scanned documentation completeness, writing quality, freshness, coverage mapping, and cross-reference integrity. Produced 6 findings (4 actionable, 2 informational). Created 4 haiku task lugs for actionable findings: AGENTS.md creation, feeds.yaml creation, terminology glossary, and architecture guide. Updated scan_state.json and schedule-index.json with last_run_at timestamp for documentation advisor. All PEV contract steps completed.
